user.title: Add a Tapo L630
user.description: Enter your Tapo account credentials. All online L630 bulbs linked to the account will be discovered automatically. The bulbs and Home Assistant must be on the same network.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Tapo L630
reauth_confirm.description: Enter the current password for this Tapo account.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Tapo Cloud
error.no_devices: No Tapo L630 bulbs are linked to this account

abort.account_updated: Existing Tapo L630 entries were consolidated into this account
